summary: C0-01 is fixed and suite failures do not trace to the owned files. C0-03 still accepts materially degenerate geometry, C0-04 remains incompatible with the exact C1 working directory, and production ingest rejects the pinned manifest because it expects the wrong shard key.

evidence: The pinned manifest SHA matches c0243e9146152c5c46b5d0aebca9d571bfd39b6e90b34227d4024d09eabcdd7e and contains exactly three IYnbdRs1Jdk rows.
All three rows receive DENIED_PERMANENT_SOURCE and split=denied.
The union-find correctly connects exact normalized channel or venue values, including transitive bridges.
3sC53GlvW_s and holdout 4qSoA-jwpVM share family:722553ada5a527bb; 3sC53GlvW_s is QUARANTINED_FAMILY_COLLISION.
The eight frozen holdout source IDs are unchanged.
evaluate_gate counts source_family_key values: 14 families failed and 15 passed.
Independent reconstruction found no other missed exact-value train/holdout edge.
C0-02.residual: The manifest labels Se7M6ZKaC4Y as PPA Tour Asia and 3sC53GlvW_s as PPA Tour. The implementation has no alias/fork-family mechanism. Based on the [official PPA announcement](https://ppatour.com/ppa-asia-and-mlp-asia-set-to-launch-bringing-world-class-pro-pickleball-to-the-worlds-most-populous-continent/), treating these as one organizational family is a credible inference requiring an explicit ruling. Merging them leaves 66/18 and eight holdout source groups unchanged, but reduces distinct holdout families from eight to seven.
C0-02.honesty_note: 66 rows / 18 families is pre-label manifest capacity, not a real usable-label gate result because the CVAT export is absent.

C0-03.impact: A second configuration with a 0.001-pixel near baseline was accepted. Repeating it across 60 train rows, 15 families, and all holdouts produced COURT_DIVERSITY_ROWS_SUFFICIENT. Materially unusable geometry can still pass the gate.

split_parser.result: The emitted train_datasets list matched 18/18 rows through load_real_training_rows.

absolute_mac_paths.result: Emitted frame_dir values are relative and contain no hardcoded Mac path.

exact_c1_relocation.reason: train_court_keypoint_heatmap.py resolves frames.frame_dir against process CWD and ignores path_base. The exact C1 command runs from the repository root, so emitted train/<source>/... paths resolve under the wrong directory and image_path becomes null.
exact_c1_relocation.test_gap: The relocation test masks this by changing CWD to the relocated corpus root before loading. That prerequisite is absent from the prescribed C1 command.

production_manifest.reason: The pinned manifest contains four shards under key shards, while _expected_export_shards reads task_shards.
production_manifest.fresh_probe: The production CLI exited 1 with: package manifest task_shards must define exactly four CVAT export shards.
production_manifest.impact: Production ingest cannot run even after the four export ZIPs arrive. The synthetic fixture hides this by creating task_shards.

attribution: Neither owned module is imported outside its owned test, and no failure traceback names either file.
Four additional final-run failures were in ABC files rewritten during collection, with tracebacks inconsistent with collected parameters.
The fifth additional failure is not a rewrite race: the unrelated flight-simulator timing test reproduced at 7.245 seconds against a 5-second threshold.
An earlier run's five exporter failures occurred during exporter rewrites and immediately reran 26/26 green.
The final run collected 4191 tests versus the 4121-test baseline, so it is not a frozen-suite comparison.
suite.artifact_gap: The JUnit files were not refreshed: focused_suite.junit.xml still records 7 tests and wide_suite.junit.xml still records 32 failures. The 18-pass and 35-failure results exist only in log_fix1.txt.

blocking_fixes: Add scale-aware minimum edge/area and stable normalized homography checks, with subpixel-sliver adversarial tests.
Resolve frame_dir relative to the corpus root in the actual trainer path, then test from the repository working directory used by the exact C1 command.
Read the pinned manifest's shards key or introduce a compatible, hash-pinned manifest revision.
Pin an explicit PPA Tour/PPA Tour Asia family ruling or alias map.
